objects.name: JetBrains security advisory (AV26-412)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26-412 Date: May 1, 2026 On April 30, 2026, JetBrains published a security advisory to address a vulnerability in the following product: JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA – versions prior to 2024.3.7.1, 2025.1.7.1, 2025.2.6.2, 2025.3.4.1 and 2026.1.1 The Cyber Centre encourages users and administrators to review the provided web link and apply the necessary updates. JetBrains – Fixed security issues
